demographics.living_situation: lives with partner, who is present and made the call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My stomach is twisting in knots, my heart is racing out of my chest, and my arms feel too heavy to lift. I feel like I'm losing my mind. (Partner speaking for her — she's drenched in sweat and can barely stay still.)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The belly pain has been getting worse over the last day and is now agonising, she's vomiting, her arms have gone weak tonight, and she's confused and terrified — the partner rang the out-of-hours line because nothing is helping.

symptom_narrative.onset: over the past 24 hours, getting much worse tonight
symptom_narrative.character: agonising twisting/cramping tummy pain that comes in severe waves; over-the-counter painkillers did nothing
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst pain she has ever felt
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over her belly, she can't point to one spot
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: comes in waves and keeps building
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — painkillers from the cupboard didn't touch it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just keeps getting worse on its own
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: severe nausea and vomiting, no bowel motion for three days, drenched in sweat, heart pounding and racing, both arms feel weak and too heavy to lift, and she's very anxious, confused and paranoid — says she feels like something terrible is about to happen
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: she doesn't recall anything exactly like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bedbound, writhing with pain, too weak to lift her arms and too agitated to settle

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a urinary tract infection recently — she just finished the antibiotics for it
past_medical_history.how_managed: a course of antibiotic tablets that she completed a few days ago

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: an antibiotic for the water infection — the empty box says trimethoprim/sulfamethoxazole (Bactrim); course just finished

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with her partner, who is present, and is doing most of the talking because she is too distressed

communication_style.typical_message_style: partner relays short, alarmed messages; patient interjects that she feels she is losing her mind

objective_data_offered.value: her urine turned a dark reddish-brown colour after the sample sat out under the bathroom light for about 15 minutes
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: a lay observation of colour change on standing, not a laboratory finding

objective_data_offered.value: she is visibly drenched in sweat, flushed, trembling and very agitated, holding her belly and struggling to keep her arms up
empty antibiotic box (trimethoprim/sulfamethoxazole) on the bedside table from the course she just finished
